reviews.text:
We are absolutely thrilled with our experience at Woodstock Carpet Depot. From start to finish, the attentiveness, quality of service, and depth of knowledge around carpet and design were outstanding.
We worked with Jeremy on the sales side, and he was an absolute pleasure—knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely invested in helping us find the right solution. He made the entire process feel easy and thoughtful.
The installation team was equally impressive. They were mindful, diligent, and incredibly respectful of our home and work space, which we truly appreciated.
We had a stair runner installed, and the end result is beautiful—expertly done and exactly what we envisioned. We would highly recommend Woodstock Carpet Depot to anyone looking for quality product, skilled craftsmanship, and exceptional customer service.

My husband and I had a crazy tight schedule which Jeremy accommodated to to help us refinish our new home's floors!

The same day we closed on our house he met us there to measure and show us samples. The floors were installed within a week after, just in time for us to move in the following week! He has been consistent with communicating and following up- keeping me updated through the entire process. It has been such a great service that we now have them redoing our carpets upstairs too!

Carpet depot came recommended to us by a neighborhood Facebook page, and my husband and I would absolutely recommend them to anyone else. Beautiful work!

Once again, Jeremy and his crew have exceeded our expectations.  In the last month we re-floored our home in Milton and my business office in Roswell.  Jeremy helped us find the right floors at a reasonable price.  Jeremy’s crew was professional and efficient.   They removed the old floors and put down the new floors and left both locations neat and clean.  I will use Carpet Depot Woodstock again and urge my friends and neighbors to do the same.

Carpet Depot Woodstock...what a find.  Our first interaction was with Jeremy Eaves and he was phenomenal.  Helped us find our perfect LVP flooring and carpet in a matter of minutes.  Matt was able to come out in a few days to get all of our rooms measured and we were put on the schedule to be installed that same week.  Juan and his team were superb in getting all of the old flooring up and new down in just 2 days.  We are very happy with the quality of product from Carpet Depot and the level of service received from Jeremy, Matt and Juan.  Fair pricing, quick service and friendly staff.  Definitely give them a call for your next flooring project.  THANK YOU!!!

Carpet Depot is awesome and the people are great!  Always on top of everything with smiles.  Sarah and Jeremy are the best with schedules, cost, and product quality.  Will always recommend them. 😊. Could not be happier with the customer service, the quality of the floor and the installation.  Very nice caring people.  The Shepard family in Hickory Flat.
